base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of toad_rescue_message_screen — a ui (dialog) from 1985 super mario bros. End-of-castle dialog screen (worlds 1-7) — 'THANK YOU \[MARIO/LUIGI\]! BUT OUR PRINCESS IS IN ANOTHER CASTLE!' text below Toad NPC sprite. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: End-of-castle dialog screen (worlds 1-7) — 'THANK YOU \[MARIO/LUIGI\]! BUT OUR PRINCESS IS IN ANOTHER CASTLE!' text below Toad NPC sprite
